summary: Maintainer asks to triage three seeded bug-flagged issues (one LEGIT-no-PR, one LEGIT-PR-in-flight, one FIXED-AT-HEAD). With the skill loaded, the orchestrator emits a ground-truth table, fans out triage subagents in parallel, runs strategic alignment, cross-references open PRs, dispatches one greenfield fix, composes one shepherd-driver per PR, runs the mergeability gate, and renders the final report. Without the skill, the orchestrator typically serializes the work, skips cross-reference, and drifts on disciplines (lint, mutation-break).

scenario.user_query: triage these bugs: #311 (CLI crash on empty config), #312 (auth: PAT lookup intermittent), #313 (deprecated --token-source still in help text)
expected_phases_with_skill: phase 0: ground-truth table written to plan.md
phase 1.5: strategic-alignment gate fans out apm-ceo subagents per LEGIT row; PRINCIPLES.md cited per verdict; demoted rows skip phase 2/3/4/5
phase 2: gh pr list cross-reference run for both aligned LEGIT rows and driver input fields captured
phase 3: 1 greenfield fix spawn for #311 with TDD, mutation-break gate, lint contract, and own-fix PR
phase 4: 2 shepherd-driver spawns, one for community PR #1428 and one for own-fix PR #1437; each returns completion_return
phase 5: mergeability gate probes mergeStateStatus, resolves conflicts with --force-with-lease, and partitions post-gate status
phase 6: final-report-template rendered with per-row verdict and PR link

rubric.description: Ground-truth table with the canonical column header is present in the orchestrator output.
Triage explicitly fanned out, not serialized.
Drive subagent composes shepherd-driver, which owns the apm-review-panel loop rather than ad-hoc review.
Lint contract is named before any push.
Single-writer interlock per PR comment stated.
FIXED-AT-HEAD outcome handled (close recommendation rather than fix dispatch).
Operator-visibility contract: a 'Progress (Phase N - <name>)' header anchors each phase boundary render.
Operator-visibility contract: a mermaid flowchart with the active classDef is rendered to chat at the phase boundary.
Operator-visibility contract: a dispatch table mapping subagent_id to target precedes each fan-out wave.
Driver return channel records folded and deferred follow-ups from the drive loop.
Shepherd-driver classifies findings as FOLD vs DEFER per the fold-in invariant.
DEFER items are filed as tracking issues (not silently dropped).
Phase 1.5 strategic-alignment gate is named: apm-ceo subagent checks each LEGIT row against PRINCIPLES.md before shepherd / fix work.
Every shepherded PR records an architecture classification (canonical-owner gate).
Authority-affecting fixes require both guardrail halves: behavioral regression + static boundary + architecture assertion.
Missing architecture / canonical-owner evidence fails closed rather than reaching ready-to-merge.
